meaning: vi.卸货,退子弹vt.摆脱...之负担,倾销,卸
examples: The truck driver was waiting to unload.
This isn't a suitable place to unload the van.
Everyone helped to unload the luggage from the car.
He also eased the tonnage minimums and allowed the companies to unload their cargo at multiple stops.
To make matters worse, you can't unload CNL shares with a phone call to your broker.
